sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἐλιούδ

- Transliteration: Elioud

- Phonetic: el-ee-ood'

- Definition: Eliud = "God his Praise"

1. the son of Achim in the genealogy of Christ. Mt. 1:15

- Origin: of hebrew origin H410 and H1935

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin ([H410] and [H1935]); God of majesty; Eliud an Israelite: - Eliud.
